creator: david@wood2.org.uk
text:
Build fails - end of output:

gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/ftp/proftpd-mysql/work/proftpd-1.3.1rc1/contrib/mod_wrap2'
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/ftp/proftpd-mysql/work/proftpd-1.3.1rc1/modules'
test -z """" -a -z """" || (cd modules/ && gmake shared)
test -z """" || (cd locale/ && gmake locale)
/bin/sh ./libtool --mode=link cc -L./lib  -rpath=/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib/mysql -L/usr/local/lib  -o proftpd src/main.o src/timers.o src/sets.o src/pool.o src/table.o src/regexp.o src/dirtree.o src/support.o src/netaddr.o src/inet.o src/child.o src/parser.o src/log.o src/lastlog.o src/xferlog.o src/bindings.o src/netacl.o src/class.o src/scoreboard.o src/help.o src/feat.o src/netio.o src/response.o src/ident.o src/data.o src/modules.o src/display.o src/auth.o src/fsio.o src/mkhome.o src/ctrls.o src/event.o src/var.o src/trace.o src/utf8.o modules/mod_core.o modules/mod_xfer.o modules/mod_auth_unix.o modules/mod_auth_file.o modules/mod_auth.o modules/mod_ls.o modules/mod_log.o modules/mod_site.o modules/mod_delay.o modules/mod_auth_pam.o modules/mod_ifsession.o modules/mod_quotatab_sql.o modules/mod_quotatab_file.o modules/mod_quotatab.o modules/mod_tls.o modules/mod_sql_mysql.o modules/mod_sql.o modules/mod_radius.o modules/mod_wrap2.o modules/mod_rewrite.o modules/mod
 _readme.o modules/mod_ratio.o  modules/module_glue.o -lsupp -lcrypt -lssl -lcrypto -L/usr/local/lib -lutil -lm -lmysqlclient -lz  -lpam 
mkdir .libs
cc -rpath=/usr/local/lib -o proftpd src/main.o src/timers.o src/sets.o src/pool.o src/table.o src/regexp.o src/dirtree.o src/support.o src/netaddr.o src/inet.o src/child.o src/parser.o src/log.o src/lastlog.o src/xferlog.o src/bindings.o src/netacl.o src/class.o src/scoreboard.o src/help.o src/feat.o src/netio.o src/response.o src/ident.o src/data.o src/modules.o src/display.o src/auth.o src/fsio.o src/mkhome.o src/ctrls.o src/event.o src/var.o src/trace.o src/utf8.o modules/mod_core.o modules/mod_xfer.o modules/mod_auth_unix.o modules/mod_auth_file.o modules/mod_auth.o modules/mod_ls.o modules/mod_log.o modules/mod_site.o modules/mod_delay.o modules/mod_auth_pam.o modules/mod_ifsession.o modules/mod_quotatab_sql.o modules/mod_quotatab_file.o modules/mod_quotatab.o modules/mod_tls.o modules/mod_sql_mysql.o modules/mod_sql.o modules/mod_radius.o modules/mod_wrap2.o modules/mod_rewrite.o modules/mod_readme.o modules/mod_ratio.o modules/module_glue.o  -L/var/ports/basejail/usr/p
 orts/ftp/proftpd-mysql/work/proftpd-1.3.1rc1/lib -L/usr/local/lib/mysql -L/usr/local/lib -lsupp -lssl -lcrypto -lutil /usr/local/lib/mysql/libmysqlclient.so -lcrypt -lm -lz -lpam -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib/mysql -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib/mysql
/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/ftp/proftpd-mysql/work/proftpd-1.3.1rc1/lib/libsupp.a(getopt.o)(.text+0x5e8): In function `_getopt_internal':
: undefined reference to `libintl_gettext'
/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/ftp/proftpd-mysql/work/proftpd-1.3.1rc1/lib/libsupp.a(getopt.o)(.text+0x6a9): In function `_getopt_internal':
: undefined reference to `libintl_gettext'
/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/ftp/proftpd-mysql/work/proftpd-1.3.1rc1/lib/libsupp.a(getopt.o)(.text+0x6da): In function `_getopt_internal':
: undefined reference to `libintl_gettext'
/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/ftp/proftpd-mysql/work/proftpd-1.3.1rc1/lib/libsupp.a(getopt.o)(.text+0x786): In function `_getopt_internal':
: undefined reference to `libintl_gettext'
/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/ftp/proftpd-mysql/work/proftpd-1.3.1rc1/lib/libsupp.a(getopt.o)(.text+0x89b): In function `_getopt_internal':
: undefined reference to `libintl_gettext'
/var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/ftp/proftpd-mysql/work/proftpd-1.3.1rc1/lib/libsupp.a(getopt.o)(.text+0x8cd): more undefined references to `libintl_gettext' follow
gmake: *** [proftpd] Error 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /basejail/usr/ports/ftp/proftpd-mysql.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade.39236.43 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=proftpd-mysql-1.3.0_5 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=1.3.0_5 make
** Fix the problem and try again.

Fix: 

Not known
How-To-Repeat: Build the port on 6.1-RELEASE-p10 i386 with the following options:

# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# No user-servicable parts inside!
# Options for proftpd-mysql-1.3.0_2
_OPTIONS_READ=proftpd-mysql-1.3.0_2
WITHOUT_IPV6=true
WITHOUT_LDAP=true
WITHOUT_LDAP_TLS=true
WITH_MYSQL=true
WITHOUT_POSTGRESQL=true
WITH_OPENSSL=true
WITH_QUOTA=true
WITH_IFSESSION=true
WITH_README=true
WITH_RATIO=true
WITH_REWRITE=true
WITH_WRAP=true
WITH_RADIUS=true
